ValidationRule.description: ORIG: LST - Built for Support Case 039 PRIOR: MM: 06/17/2019 NEW: MG: 09/25/2022 standardized format - Labeled Error MSG (CASES' to CASE')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_034: If Type is "Field Service" and Sub Type is "Installation" the Completeness, Functional, and Packaging is required.
